# Codebase Intelligence Platform

> Production RAG-over-code engine: connect a repo, get semantic+lexical search, grounded Q&A with file:line citations, living auto-docs, architecture diagrams, and impact/blast-radius analysis — exposed via REST API and MCP server. Project #2 (core engine) of the AI Startup Lab; reused by ContextOS (#1) and System Design Assistant (#6). Spec-first; no app code yet.

## Core
- [README](./README.md): What/why/how + capability ladder
- [VISION](./VISION.md): Best code-understanding engine; reusable infrastructure
- [PROBLEM](./PROBLEM.md): Codebases too big to understand; shallow tools
- [CUSTOMERS](./CUSTOMERS.md): Teams, agencies, enterprise, API/agent builders
- [FEATURES](./FEATURES.md): MVP→V3
- [USER_STORIES](./USER_STORIES.md): 100+ stories

## Engineering
- [ARCHITECTURE](./ARCHITECTURE.md): Ingestion/search/graph services (Mermaid)
- [TECH_STACK](./TECH_STACK.md): + tree-sitter, symbol graph, rerank, Shiki, Mermaid
- [DATABASE](./DATABASE.md): chunks/embeddings/symbols/symbol_edges; ERD; impact CTE
- [API_DESIGN](./API_DESIGN.md): REST + MCP (engine-as-a-service)
- [AI_ARCHITECTURE](./AI_ARCHITECTURE.md): models/embeddings/retrieval/graph/evals
- [RAG](./RAG.md): THE moat — AST chunk → hybrid+graph retrieve → rerank → cite
- [MCP](./MCP.md): MCP server (search_code/ask_codebase/impact_of/...)
- [AGENT_DESIGN](./AGENT_DESIGN.md): read-only Q&A + PR-review agents

## Production
- [SECURITY](./SECURITY.md) (code privacy, secret redaction, D-010), [OBSERVABILITY](./OBSERVABILITY.md), [GUARDRAILS](./GUARDRAILS.md) (anti-hallucination), [DEVOPS](./DEVOPS.md)

## Execution
- [TASKS](./TASKS.md), [SPRINTS](./SPRINTS.md) (MVP ≈10 weeks)

## Business
- [PRICING](./PRICING.md) (+ usage-based API tier), [GTM](./GTM.md) (public OSS-repo demo), [SALES](./SALES.md), [RISKS](./RISKS.md), [HIRING](./HIRING.md), [OPEN_SOURCE](./OPEN_SOURCE.md), [RESUME_VALUE](./RESUME_VALUE.md)

## For agents
- [CLAUDE.md](./CLAUDE.md), [AGENTS.md](./AGENTS.md), [mcp.json](./mcp.json)

## Key decisions (../DECISION_LOG.md)
- D-001 no model training · D-003 Claude+abstraction · D-004 Postgres+pgvector · D-010 code never trains a model
## Differentiator
Accuracy via AST chunking + symbol-graph RAG + re-ranking + published evals.
